proc closeGamepads() {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Closes Linux gamepad support and releases resources. Source   Edit   
proc initGamepads() {....raises: [PaddyError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Initializes Linux gamepad support. Source   Edit   
proc pollGamepads(): seq[Gamepad] {....raises: [PaddyError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Polls Linux gamepads and returns connected snapshots. Source   Edit
